low_level_interface.execution_boundary: real_runner creates env, adapter calls env.step(action)
available_runtime_calls: robot._pull_cube_success() / robot._is_grasping(name) when provided by adapter base
writable_artifacts: target_adapter module with build_robot(env, *, control_mode, robot_uid)
experiment action plan JSON choosing allowed_tools

known_action_layout.action_semantics: action[0:3]=normalized TCP xyz delta, action[3]=active gripper command

allowed_tools.name: run_single_seed
allowed_tools.description: Run the current target adapter once in the real ManiSkill environment.
allowed_tools.command_template: python -m maniskill_backend.real_runner --task pull_cube --robot xarm6_robotiq --method target-module-generation --seed 0 --control-mode pd_ee_delta_pos --sim-backend auto --render-backend gpu --max-episode-steps 500 --code-file maniskill_backend/case_programs/case01_pull_cube.py --adapter-module maniskill_backend.generated_adapters.case02_xarm6_pull_cube

allowed_tools.name: run_multi_seed
allowed_tools.description: Evaluate current adapter across a seed set without regenerating code.
allowed_tools.command_template: python scripts/pullcube_multiseed_eval.py --seeds 0 --robot xarm6_robotiq --adapter-module maniskill_backend.generated_adapters.case02_xarm6_pull_cube --code-file maniskill_backend/case_programs/case01_pull_cube.py --control-mode pd_ee_delta_pos --sim-backend auto --render-backend gpu --max-episode-steps 500

allowed_tools.name: run_structured_probe
allowed_tools.description: Run a bounded parameter sweep for the current physical bottleneck.

allowed_tools.name: run_llm_repair
allowed_tools.description: Ask the LLM to rewrite only the target-side adapter using available tool outputs.

allowed_tools.name: inspect_results
allowed_tools.description: Read compact JSON/Markdown artifacts instead of raw simulator internals.
